name: accounting firms managing 10–20 subscriptions/month tool
description: For accounting firms managing 10–20 subscriptions/month, missed payment deadlines cause late fees. We automate payment reminders instead of manual tracking of subscription renewals.
problem_solved: missed payment deadlines leading to late fees
